rightValue.stringValue: Perform all Virtual Health Offboarding Tasks

rules.name: Is_EM_HM_UC
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11)

rightValue.stringValue: Communicate Program Transition to Onsite Team
